basic_details.job_title: CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of South Bihar (CUSB) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 8 July 2026 on the official website of the Central University of South Bihar cusb.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in age is permissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science or related field or related sciences with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes
qualification.details: M.Sc./M.tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science or related field or related sciences with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CUSB Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.central_university_of_south_bihar_cusb: M.Sc./M.tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science or related field or related sciences with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUSB Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc./M.tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science or related field or related sciences with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes.

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in age is permissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSB Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Associate post at Central University of South Bihar is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc./M.tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science or a related field with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate position at CUSB will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for the CUSB Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Project Associate post at CUSB are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate position at the Central University of South Bihar.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central University of South Bihar located?
faq.answer: The Central University of South Bihar is located in Gaya, Bihar, with the pincode 824236.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CUSB/Devl RP-127/2026/226.
